system.description: Enter Shell Step with a 3-turn duration. During this period: you are completely untargetable; Cascade accumulates normally from any damage taken by allies (not just you — you are absorbing the resonance of the battle without being in it); and on the turn you choose to exit, your exit Attack card costs 0 AP and deals damage equal to 16 + EDGE + (3 × total Cascade accumulated during Shell Step). You were gone. The battlefield kept moving. You kept count.
